title: Competitive analysis: Tandem
text:
# Competitor Analysis — Tandem
Date: 2026-04-19

## Strengths
Tandem is strong in: Reporting & Export, User Management & SSO, Integrations. Notably they ship SSO/SAML and global search out of the box.

## Weaknesses
Weaker in: Dashboards, Notifications.

## Threat assessment
We are losing evaluations where customers need SSO and cross-workspace search — both frequent Flowdesk requests. Recommend prioritizing these to defend Enterprise deals.
